programme.desc: The team investigates when the body of an NCIS facilities manager is found four months after she went missing; as the team faces mandatory psych evaluations, Gibbs is concerned about Abby's recurring nightmares.

programme.desc: Ducky orders the exhumation of a body from a 12-year-old case; the team investigates a Marine's death.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: When a helicopter crew's training mission ends in a disastrous crash, the NCIS team must figure out what happened and find the missing pilot; Ziva challenges McGee and Tony to a dare.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: When a petty officer is shot in a billionaire's car, the investigation leads the team to Gibbs' namesake.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: When a Navy lieutenant is killed in a brutal attack shortly after returning home from the Middle East, the team questions the victim's friend, a Marine captain with post-traumatic stress disorder.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Capt. Westcott continues to help the team track a terrorist; Abby is excited about the NCIS Thanksgiving dinner; Tony is curious when he learns that Ziva is making special plans.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: As the team searches for an abducted teenager, Abby and Ziva work closely with a friend of the girl who witnessed the kidnapping; Gibbs turns to a former contact for help; Tony is jealous when Ziva makes plans with another man.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: When FBI Agent Fornell becomes the target of a shooting, he and the NCIS team launch a joint investigation; rumors run wild when Diane, the ex-wife of both Gibbs and Fornell, spends the night at McGee's.

programme.desc: The team aids Manhattan shopkeepers victimized by mobsters extorting protection money; guest Yaphet Kotto.

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: Fanatical mountain men attack after the team crash-lands deep in the Appalachians; guests Edward Winter, Bill McKinney.

programme.desc: A rancher (Stuart Whitman) tries to ruin a Vietnam veteran's (Robert Sampson) struggling farm; guest Tim Rossovich.

programme.desc: Guerrilla terrorists capture an Army general and his daughter. With George Peppard, Dirk Benedict, Mr. T, Dwight Schultz.

programme.sub-title: The Beast From the Belly of a Boeing

programme.desc: A mysterious woman (Kristen Meadows) wants her slain father's South African diamond mine freed from unscrupulous businessmen.

programme.desc: The team members aid their former POW cook (Mako), an unwitting participant in drug smuggling; guest Marjoe Gortner.
